name: miniscoreboard
v1_prompt: Implement {{binary_name}} as described in SPEC-v1.txt using {{language}}. The executable must be named '{{binary_name}}.py' and handle init and add-match commands.
v2_prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing {{binary_name}} implementation with the history and team commands. Verify your implementation using test-v2.sh.
